# AllOverIt.GenericHost

## Purpose
This package contains generic host helpers and convenience methods for setting up console applications that support dependency injection.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.GenericHost/AllOverIt.GenericHost.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0;net9.0;net8.0
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, GenericHost
- Depends on: AllOverIt

## Public API Signals (from source)
### Representative public types
- class BackgroundWorker
- class ConsoleAppBase
- class GenericAppBase
- class GenericHost
- interface IConsoleApp
- interface IGenericApp

### Active namespaces
- AllOverIt.GenericHost

## Notes For Agents
